# activeFormatIndex

**Instance Property**

The index of the active format.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc var activeFormatIndex: Int? { get set }
```

## Discussion

This value represents the index of the active format in the source’s [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/CMIOExtensionStreamSource/formats] array.

The key for this property is [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/CMIOExtensionProperty/streamActiveFormatIndex].

## Configuring Source Properties

- **frameDuration**: The duration of the frame.
- **maxFrameDuration**: The maximum duration of a frame.

items.description: The maximum duration of a frame.
